arts.ttl: 'I was a promising Man Utd youngster - Sir Alex Ferguson came to my school just to give me hairdryer'
arts.sum: Nicky Butt and Paul Scholes have opened up on their relationship with Sir Alex Ferguson as teenagers, with Butt revealing just how scary the Manchester United boss could be

arts.ttl: Report: How Man Utd can beat Real Madrid to Alphonso Davies transfer
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies would listen to an approach from Manchester United if they are prepared to meet his wage demands, a report has revealed. United offered the young defender a higher salary than Madrid officials were prepared to pay, although that stance came from the fact Yoro was entering the final year of his contract and would have been available on a free transfer in 2025, as is the case with Davies.

arts.ttl: Man United v Brentford: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Man United v Brentford: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag hits back at media as defender provides surprise injury boost
arts.sum: Manchester United face Brentford at Old Trafford with Erik ten Hag badly needing a win after awful start to Premier League season that has left his future being called into doubt

arts.ttl: Man Utd star Rasmus Hojlund slammed for causing gruesome injury to teammate - 'It’s poor'
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund endured a mixed season in front of goal during his debut season with Manchester United following a move from Atlanta and even dealt some damage to a teammate

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag: Man Utd will need Sir Alex Ferguson despite end to ambassador role
arts.sum: Ferguson will leave his role at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag delivers verdict on shock Sir Alex Ferguson Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson will stop serving as a Man United ambassador at the end of the season in the latest cost-cutting measure.

arts.ttl: The one tactical tweak Erik ten Hag must make to help Man United combat Brentford's fast and furious starts, writes MARTIN KEOWN
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: In football, every restart can be seen as a set-piece and nobody embraces this idea more than Brentford, to the extent they consider kick-offs as opportunistic as corners and free-kicks.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag breaks his silence on Sir Alex Ferguson's Man United sacking after club legend was controversially stripped of his £2million-a-year contract
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ferguson will miss Saturday's clash with Brentford at Old Trafford, the first game since he was informed that this will be his last season as an ambassador.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes telling Sir Alex Ferguson admission after Man Utd legend's ruthless axe
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has opened up on the pressure of handling expectations at Manchester United and admitted it is hard for those following Sir Alex Ferguson to match his peerless standards
